Record season: 1.83B cumulative views across 24 races (6.8% YoY). US record 1.32M avg per race on ESPN (ESPN holds US rights through 2025; Apple TV+ takes over from 2026). Global fanbase 827M (+12% YoY). 19 of 24 events sold out.
